name: auth.revoke
description: Revoke an existing grant and invalidate cached credentials for an agent/user/tool combination.

grant_id.description: Identifier of the grant to revoke.

revoked_by.description: Actor (user id or system principal) performing the revocation.

reason.description: Optional explanation logged to audit trail.
Failure reason when success is false.

errors.description: Requested grant_id does not exist or has already been revoked.
Attempted revocation violates policy restrictions (e.g., insufficient role).
